ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + og('description').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
jm=java.base64Decode(java.getString('[name="client"]@content'));
if(jm.length()>1){
var conts = [],list=[];
var datas = java.getElements('#content div');
e=String(jm).split(/[A-Z]+%/);
for(i=0,j=0;i<e.length;i++){
	if (e[i] < 3) {
      conts[e[i]] = datas[i + 0].ownText();
      j++;
  } else {
      conts[e[i] - j] = datas[i + 0].ownText();
      j = j + 2;
   }
}
  conts.join('\n')
}else{java.getString("#content@html")}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
as=java.getElements('#dir dl[class="dir"] dd a');
for(i=0,list=[];i<as.length;i++){
	if(!new RegExp(as[i].text(),'g').test(list.join(''))){
		list.push(as[i])
	}
}
list
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);

var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text())

var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));

var book = {
      name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|（.*）/,''),

      author: og('novel:author'),

      kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/,''),

      latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g,''), 

      intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/,' ').replace(/\//g,'-') + '\n' + o('.book-describe').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/,'').replace(/\s+/g,'\n'),

      cover: og('image'),

      url: og('novel:read_url'),
};

book;
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('.m-book_info p').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('.intro p:eq(1)').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: baseUrl,
};
book;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
 loadDocType="{{@@body@data-doctype}}";
 loadType="{{@@body@data-randomtype}}";
sid=baseUrl.match(/(\d+).html/)[1];
url=baseUrl.replace(/\d+.html/,'')

var section = {
    loadDocType: loadDocType,
    loadType: loadType,
    sid:sid,
    content: {
        childNode: [],
        
        init: function(c){
            this.body=c
            if (section.loadType == 'normal') {
      this.load(String(java.base64Decode(java.getString('//*[@name="client"]/@content'))))
            } else if (section.loadType == 'substep') {
                var d = 'r' + section.sid;
                var f = false;
                if (section.loadDocType == 'xml') {
                    d += '.xml'
                } else if (section.loadDocType == 'json') {
                    d += '.json';
                    f = true
                } else {
                    return false
                };        
             cookie="PHPSESSID="+java.get(baseUrl,{}).cookie("PHPSESSID");
            token= java.get(url+d,{"X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest","referer":baseUrl,"cookie":String(cookie)}).header("token")                
                	this.load(token)      	
            } else {
                return false
            };               
        },
        load: function(a) {         
            a = String(java.base64Decode(a)).split(/[A-Z]+%/);      
            var b = 0,
            start = 0;
            for (var i = 0; i < this.body.length; i++) {
                if (String(this.body[i]).match(/h2/i)) {
                    start = i + 1
                };
                if (String(this.body[i]).match(/div/i)&& this.body[i].attr("class") != 'chapter') {
                    break
                }
            };
          
            for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
                if (a[i] < 5) {
                    this.childNode[a[i]] = this.body[i + start];
                      b++
                } else {
                    this.childNode[a[i] - b] = this.body[i + start]                 
                }
            };
  }
}
}
section.content.init(java.getElement("@@id.content@children!0").toArray());
section.content.childNode.join("")
</js>

<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('.m-book_info p').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

// 验证码处理 v2 by 酷安@靈狐

// 如果获取不到相关cookie就上传图片识别

// 代码最佳运行环境是在书籍列表页
// 移植其他地方可能会出现bug
// 如果搜索会跳转详情页请完善详情页正则
// 滑到最下面传入参数需要更改

var ocr=true // 是否启用ocr，关闭后手动输入，对于手动输入请开启CookieJar或在请求头手动设置一个cookie（部分网站不适用）
var mode=0
/*
0:"百度_通用"
1:"百度_高精度
2:"百度_网络图片"
3:"腾讯_通用"
4:"腾讯_高精度"
5:"腾讯_手写"
6:"腾讯_英语"
*/
var save=false // 是否缓存验证码供多次使用

var toast_level=0
/*
	0:关闭toast弹窗
	1:显示错误消息
	2:显示全部
*/

var tx_cookie={
	'uin':'',
	'skey':''
}
var header=source.header||''
header=JSON.parse(header!=''?header:'{}')
function concat(o,split){
	let result=''
	for(i in o){
		let v=o[i]
		v=v&&'='+java.encodeURI(v)||''
		result+=result==''&&i+v||split+i+v
	}
	return result
}
tx_cookie=String(concat(tx_cookie,';'))
var Ocr={
tencent:function(base64,mode){
	let extra,params,action,data,body,res,json
	extra={
	 "LanguageType":"en",
		//"IsPdf":true,
		"ImageBase64":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"+base64
	}
 params={
		"ToModule":"ocr",
		"Extra":JSON.stringify(extra)
	}
 action=[
  'GeneralBasicOCR',
  'GeneralAccurateOCR',
  'GeneralHandwritingOCR',
  'EnglishOCR'
 ]
 params.ToAction=action[mode||0]
 body=JSON.stringify(params)
 data={
		"Action":"OcrDemo",
		"CloudEnv":"Formal",
		"Region":"ap-guangzhou",
		"Params":JSON.stringify(params)
		}
	body=JSON.stringify(data)
	res=java.post('https://ocr.smartform.cloud.tencent.com/ocr/forward/cloud',body,{cookie:tx_cookie})
		json=JSON.parse(res.body()).Response
		data=json.Data
		let result=''
		if(data){
			json=JSON.parse(data).Response.TextDetections
			for(i in json){
				result+=json[i].DetectedText
			}
		}else{
			this.msg=json.Error.Message
		}
		return result
},
baidu:function(base64,mode){
	let data,body,type,url,res,json
	data={
		image:'data:image/jpeg;base64,'+base64,
		image_url:null,
		type:'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/',
		detect_direction:false,
		language_type:'ENG'
		}
		type=[
		 'general_basic',
		 'accurate_basic',
		 'webimage'
		]
		data.type=data.type+type[mode||0]
		body=concat(data,'&')
		let result=''
		url='https://ai.baidu.com/aidemo'
		res=java.post(url,body,{'referer':url})
		json=JSON.parse(res.body())
		if(json.errno==0){
		 json=json.data.words_result
		 for(i in json){
			 result+=json[i].words
		 }
		}else{
			this.msg=json.msg
		}
		return result
},
get:function(base64){
	let result
 if(mode<3){
 	 result=this.baidu(base64,mode)
 	}else{
 		result=this.tencent(base64,mode-3)
 	}
 	if(this.msg){
 		java.log(this.msg)
 		if(toast_level>0){
 			java.toast(this.msg)
 		}
 		this.msg=null
 	}
 return result
 }
}
function imgToBase64(imgUrl){
	let res=org.jsoup.Jsoup.connect(imgUrl).ignoreContentType(true).ignoreHttpErrors(true).execute()
	header['cookie']=String(concat(res.cookies(),';'))
	let base64=Packages.cn.hutool.core.codec.Base64.encode(res.bodyAsBytes())
	return base64
}
function Url(u){
	if(!u.match('^http')){
		u = source.getKey()+'///'+u
	}
	u = u.match(/(https?:\/\/)(.+)/)
	u = u[1]+u[2].replace(/\/+/,'/')
	return u
}
function auto(o){
	let base64,yzm,msg,body,res
	if(save&&try_times==0){
		yzm=cache.get('yzm')
		let temp=cache.get('cookie')
		if(temp){
		 header.cookie=temp
		}
	}
	if(!yzm){
	 if(ocr){
	  base64=imgToBase64(Url(o.img))
	  yzm=Ocr.get(base64).replace(/[^\w]/g,'')
	  if(yzm!==''){
	   msg='识别验证码：'+yzm
	   java.log(msg)
	   if(toast_level>1){
	    java.toast(msg)
	   }
	  }
	 }else{
		 yzm=java.getVerificationCode(Url(o.img))
	 }
	}
	if(save){
		cache.delete('yzm')
		cache.delete('cookie')
		cache.put('yzm',yzm)
		cache.put('cookie',header.cookie)
	}
	for(i in o.data){
		if(!o.data||o.data[i]==''){
			o.data[i]=yzm
		}
	}
	body=concat(o.data,'&')
	method=o.method.toLowerCase()
	if(method=='post'){
	 res=java.post(Url(o.action),body,header)
	}else{
		res=java.get(Url(o.action+'/?')+body,header)
	}
	let jump=res.header("Location")
	jump=jump&&Url(jump)
 if(jump){
  	// 主要用在动态获取更新html，不需要可直接
  	// result='验证码'
 	 result=java.ajax(jump)
	 if(jump.match(source.bookUrlPattern)){
		 java.put('src',result)
		 source.bookUrlPattern=''
		 info=source.bookInfoRule.init
		 js="<"+"js>java.get('src')</"+"js>"
		 source.bookInfoRule.init=js+info
		 toc=source.tocRule.chapterList
		 source.tocRule.chapterList=js+toc
		 result=''
	 }
 }else{
 	 result=res.body()
 	}
	return result
}
max_try=10
try_times=0
while(result.match('验证码')){
 img=java.getString('img@src')
 input=java.getElement('input')
 data={}
 for([i,node] of Object.entries(input)){
		data[node.attr('name')]=node.attr('value')
	}
	u=java.getString('form@action')
 result=auto({
  action:u,
	 method:'post',
	 img:img,
	 data:data
	})
	/*上面是动态获取例子，以下是手动填入例子
	auto({
		action:"gut.php", // 提交数据地址
		method:'post', // 提交方式
		img:'captcha.php', // 验证码图片
		data:{ // 提交参数键值对
			search:'系统', // 搜索关键字
			captcha:'' // 识别为空的关键字为验证码
	 }
	})
	搜索关键字不从网页获取就用java.put('key',key)和java.get('key')
	已经很简单了，再不会打屁屁
	*/
if(try_times>=max_try){break}
try_times+=1
}
result
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var url=baseUrl.replace(/(\d+).html/,"r$1.json"),
path="#content@children!0",
txt=java.getElement(path).toArray();
var head={"X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest","Referer":baseUrl};
token=java.get(url,head).header("token")
dec=java.base64Decode(token);
var str=String(dec),
lis=str.split(/[A-Z]+%/);
var x=0,y=0,c=[];
for(i=0;i<txt.length;i++){
	go=String(txt[i])
	if(/h2/i.test(go)){
		y=i+1;
		}
	}
	for(i=0;i<lis.length;i++){
		if(lis[i]<5){
			c[lis[i]]=txt[i+y];
				x++;
			}else{
				c[lis[i]-x]=txt[i+y];
				}
		}
		c.join("");
</js>

ruleToc.chapterName:
$.chapter_name@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*[\)\}）｝】]/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
//java.log(result)
doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result)
$ = (a) => doc.select(a)
if (/function S2H/.test(result)) {
	function S2H(s){
        var r = [];
        for(var i=0;i<s.length/2;i++){
            r[r.length]= parseInt(s.substr(i*2,2), 16);
        }
        return r;
    }
    var str = S2H(String($('str').html()).replace(/\s/ig,''));
    var key = S2H(String(cookie.getKey(source.getKey(),'key')));
    var x = 0, ret = "";
    for(var i=0;i<str.length;i++){
        var d = (str[i] + key[x]);
        if(d>255)d=d%255;
        ret+='%'+('0'+d.toString(16)).substr(-2,2);
        x++; if(x>=key.length) x=0;
    }
    var html = decodeURIComponent(decodeURI(ret));
    $('str').html(html);
}
//java.log(doc)
doc;
</js>

<js>doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result)
$ = (a) => doc.select(a)
if (/function S2H/.test(result)) {
	function S2H(s){
        var r = [];
        for(var i=0;i<s.length/2;i++){
            r[r.length]= parseInt(s.substr(i*2,2), 16);
        }
        return r;
    }
    var str = S2H(String($('str').html()).replace(/\s/ig,''));
    var key = S2H(String(cookie.getKey(source.getKey(),'key')));
    var x = 0, ret = "";
    for(var i=0;i<str.length;i++){
        var d = (str[i] + key[x]);
        if(d>255)d=d%255;
        ret+='%'+('0'+d.toString(16)).substr(-2,2);
        x++; if(x>=key.length) x=0;
    }
    var html = decodeURIComponent(decodeURI(ret));
    $('str').html(html);
}
doc</js>html:has(meta[property="og:type"])||ul:has(li.col-md-4.col-sm-8.col-xs-8:has(a))

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:lastest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + og('description').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
 loadDocType="{{@@body@data-doctype}}";
 loadType="{{@@body@data-randomtype}}";
sid=baseUrl.match(/(\d+).html/)[1];
url=baseUrl.replace(/\d+.html/,'')

var section = {
    loadDocType: loadDocType,
    loadType: loadType,
    sid:sid,
    content: {
        childNode: [],
        
        init: function(c){
            this.body=c
            if (section.loadType == 'normal') {
      this.load(String(java.base64Decode(java.getString('//*[@name="client"]/@content'))))
            } else if (section.loadType == 'substep') {
                var d = 'r' + section.sid;
                var f = false;
                if (section.loadDocType == 'xml') {
                    d += '.xml'
                } else if (section.loadDocType == 'json') {
                    d += '.json';
                    f = true
                } else {
                    return false
                };        
             cookie="PHPSESSID="+java.get(baseUrl,{}).cookie("PHPSESSID");
            token= java.get(url+d,{"X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest","referer":baseUrl,"cookie":String(cookie)}).header("token")                
                	this.load(token)      	
            } else {
                return false
            };               
        },
        load: function(a) {         
            a = String(java.base64Decode(a)).split(/[A-Z]+%/);      
            var b = 0,
            start = 0;
            for (var i = 0; i < this.body.length; i++) {
                if (String(this.body[i]).match(/h2/i)) {
                    start = i + 1
                };
                if (String(this.body[i]).match(/div/i)&& this.body[i].attr("class") != 'chapter') {
                    break
                }
            };
          
            for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
                if (a[i] < 5) {
                    this.childNode[a[i]] = this.body[i + start];
                      b++
                } else {
                    this.childNode[a[i] - b] = this.body[i + start]                 
                }
            };
  }
}
}
section.content.init(java.getElement("@@id.content@children!0").toArray());
section.content.childNode.join("")
</js>
